summary: Sprint G+ iteration 11 — verified useHookah hook refactor (DRY) and TrophyUnlock fullscreen animation rewrite. All hookah regression scenarios PASS across Lobby3D / Street3D / HomeInterior3D. RankBadge regression PASS. TrophyUnlock JSX verified via code review (E2E trigger impractical without 150K winnings — see notes).
verified_features: useHookah shared hook EXISTS at /app/frontend/src/game/useHookah.js (20 lines) — exports default + named useHookah(profile) returning {equippedHookah, hasHookah, usingHookah, useHookah}.
Lobby3D.jsx imports useHookah and uses destructured useHookahFn at lobby-hookah-btn (line 4442). Verified click → disabled=True, text='💨...' (working).
Street3D.jsx imports useHookah, uses useHookahFn at street-hookah-btn (line 2791). Click → disabled=True, text='💨...' (working).
HomeInterior3D.jsx imports useHookah, uses useHookahFn at home-hookah-btn (line 1015). Click → disabled=True, text='💨...' (working).
Hookah re-enables to 'CHICHA' after 7s (verified end-to-end on Lobby3D — disabled=False, text='💨CHICHA' at 7.8s mark).
rank-badge (compact) FOUND in FortniteLobby HUD, content '🏅Recrue' for new player (winnings=0 < 150K Bronze threshold).
rank-badge-full FOUND in UniversalMenu drawer, content 'RANG ACTUEL RECRUE 0% → 🥉 Bronze'.

TrophyUnlock component (Trophies.jsx lines 81-242) — verified by code review: [data-testid=trophy-unlock-overlay] present, 50 confetti particles loop, spinning radial rays, scale-in cubic-bezier(.2,.9,.25,1.6) trophy card, pulsing icon (trophy-icon-pop alt), audio fanfare 3 ascending notes (C5/E5/G5) + filtered noise cymbal at 350ms, gold reward badge '+ X $ BONUS', click anywhere to close. Export `{ TrophyScreen, TrophyUnlock }` confirmed.
Casino.jsx line 449: setTimeout(setUnlockedTrophy(null), 6500) — bumped from 5000ms to 6500ms to match new 6.5s animation (verified).

Smoke test: Login → SOLO server → Device PC → FortniteLobby → UniversalMenu drawer → Shop tab → Hookahs tab → Buy hookah-classic → Close → __openLobby → Hookah click → __openStreet → Hookah click → __openHome('bj-apt') → Hookah click → __openFortniteLobby → Trophies tab. Zero console errors. Zero page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Variable shadowing in useHookah.js: inner `const useHookah = useCallback(...)` shadows the outer hook function name within scope. Functionally OK (closure works), but slightly confusing. Consider renaming the inner callback to `useHookahFn` or `triggerHookah` for clarity.

TrophyUnlock animation duration is 6.5s but Casino.jsx auto-close timeout matches at 6500ms — good. However, if the user clicks the overlay manually (it's clickable), onClose fires immediately and the auto-timeout still runs in background; both call setUnlockedTrophy(null) which is idempotent — no bug, just redundant.

TrophyUnlock confetti generation is computed inside render body (50 random particles each render). Since the component only mounts once per unlock, this is fine. If parent ever re-renders, confetti positions will jump. Consider useMemo([trophy.name]) for stability — minor polish.

AudioContext is created on every TrophyUnlock mount and never closed (potential memory leak if many unlocks). Add `return () => ctx.close()` cleanup in useEffect — minor, low impact since only fires occasionally.
Lobby3D.jsx (≈4600 lines) and Street3D.jsx (≈3300 lines) still over the 700-line guideline (carried from iter_9/10). Split recommended.
FPHookahView in Lobby3D still gated by `viewMode==='first'` (line 4597) but lobby-hookah-btn (line 4442) is not — same observation as iter_10. Intentional design or bug — needs E1 confirmation.
test_credentials: Any pseudo on Login (used 'TestT11' / 'TestTrophy11' in SOLO mode).
seed_data_creation: window.__addBalance(20000000) + Shop hookah-classic purchase. localStorage gamblelife_onboarding_done=1 to skip onboarding overlay (it intercepts pointer events on Street3D/HomeInterior3D first-entry).
context_for_next_testing_agent: (1) Onboarding tutorial overlay [data-testid=onboarding-overlay] intercepts pointer events on first entry to Lobby3D / Street3D / HomeInterior3D — pre-set localStorage.setItem('gamblelife_onboarding_done','1') BEFORE login OR click 'Passer' button to skip. This was the root cause of false 'street-hookah-btn click failed' in early test runs. (2) Shop modal must be closed via 'Fermer' text button (NOT just closing the menu drawer with Escape/menu-close) — they are separately stacked. (3) E2E trophy unlock trigger is impractical: requires totalWinnings >= 150000 which only increments via Casino.handleBalanceChange (positive diff). __addBalance(n) bumps balance directly without going through handleBalanceChange so does NOT update totalWinnings. To force a trophy E2E, would need to play ~75 winning blackjack hands @ 2K bet — recommend code-review or React DevTools state injection instead. (4) Hookah animation total = 7s (state) but Casino trophy unlock now matches the 6.5s setTimeout.
